title: Marcus Makes Morning Music
synopsis: Baby Marcus discovers the wonderful sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family, from clapping hands to sizzling pancakes.

pages.text: Clap, clap! Marcus wakes up in his cozy bed. The sun peeks through his window.

illustration.description: A toddler named Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits up in his crib wearing soft pajamas, clapping his hands together with joy as golden morning light streams through the window
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping in his crib on a sunny morning

pages.text: Rustle, rustle! Daddy reads the newspaper. The pages make happy sounds.

illustration.description: A father in comfortable pajamas sits in a sunlit living room reading a newspaper while Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes crawls nearby, both bathed in warm golden Sunday morning light
illustration.alt: Daddy reading newspaper while Marcus plays nearby

pages.text: Sizzle, pop! Mama makes pancakes in the kitchen. Yummy breakfast sounds!

illustration.description: A mother cooking pancakes at the stove while Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits in his high chair watching, steam rising from the pan in the bright, sunlit kitchen
illustration.alt: Mama cooking pancakes while Marcus watches from his high chair

pages.text: Pat, pat! Marcus pats his tummy. Full and happy with his family.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits contentedly patting his tummy while his parents smile nearby in their cozy, sun-drenched dining area, all wearing comfortable morning clothes
illustration.alt: Marcus patting his full tummy with his happy family

pages.text: Giggle, giggle! Sunday morning sounds with Mama and Daddy are the best sounds of all!

illustration.description: The whole family snuggling together on a couch in golden morning light, with Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes laughing joyfully between his parents, all in comfortable pajamas
illustration.alt: Marcus giggling happily with his parents on the couch

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound does Marcus make when he wakes up?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands when he wakes up in his cozy bed!

questions.question: What is Mama making for breakfast?
questions.explanation: Mama is making pancakes that go sizzle and pop in the kitchen!

questions.question: How does Marcus feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Marcus giggles because he's happy with his family on Sunday morning!
